core_requirements: Strong background in generative modeling and probabilistic machine learning
Experience formulating and solving constrained or multi-objective optimization problems
Hands-on experience with modern experiment configuration/tracking tooling (Hydra, W&B, or similar)
Comfort reporting calibration and generative-quality metrics
nice_to_have: Publications or open-source contributions in generative modeling or calibration
summary_paragraph: The role of Machine Learning Research Engineer involves developing generative modeling methods for structured prediction problems. The position requires designing new model architectures, conducting benchmark comparisons, and ensuring results are reproducible. This role is situated in the general software industry and demands a strong background in generative modeling and probabilistic machine learning, along with experience in optimization problems and experiment tracking tools.

matched_skills.evidence: - Strong background in generative modeling and probabilistic machine learning.
- Use experiment tracking tools (e.g. Weights & Biases) to log, compare, and reproduce results across runs.
